title: Prequalification of Building Contractors & Consultants - January 2026
description: NMB Bank Plc invites applications for prequalification of building contractors and consultants for the year 2026. This covers construction, renovation, and consulting services for NMB Bank's branch network and facilities across Tanzania.

contact.name: Secretary, NMB Bank Plc Management Tender Committee
contact.address: NMB Head Office, Ohio/Ali Hassan Mwinyi Road, PO Box 9213, Dar es Salaam, Tanzania

eligibility: Based on historical prequalification requirements: Valid registration certificate, business license, certificate of incorporation, TIN, VAT registration. Minimum 3 years experience. Audited financial statements.
scrape_notes: Primary source (nmbbank.co.tz) blocked by Cloudflare. Tender found via mabumbe.net aggregator. Detail page paywalled. Closing date and full documents unavailable - recommend checking nmbbank.co.tz directly or contacting procurement@nmbtz.com.
